rationale: Educ. Code §12.105 merely establishes that open-enrollment charter schools are part of the public school system. It contains no provision related to homestead exemptions or tax appraisal values, so no conflict arises.
quote: An open-enrollment charter school is part of the public school system of this state.
_note: No operative relationship between this statute and the proposed Tax Code §11.13(b) change.
